_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: deconvolution analyses of cell type abundances from bulk transcriptomes of human benign PNF and NF1-associated MPNST showed significantly increased proportions of advanced stage–specific MES-NC–like tumor cells in addition to cycling tumor cells in MPNSTs
details: Successfully performed deconvolution analyses showing significantly increased proportions of advanced stage-specific MES-NC-like tumor cells in MPNSTs compared to benign NFs
